expertAssessments.rationale: Production v8.11.13 preserved the same handoff path, traceId, tool chain, engine label, and recent 1 hour time range after sidebar to fullscreen workspace navigation.
The production parity path was revalidated end-to-end with Playwright after deploy propagation, including guest entry, dashboard CTA, sidebar response, fullscreen transition, and console cleanliness.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed before production targeted QA; effective 9.1391 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, no unexpected billed usage spike.

notes: Production /api/version returned version 8.11.13 before QA started.
